name: RSS Reader
description: Subscribe to and read RSS/Atom feeds — manage subscriptions, fetch latest entries, and stay current on any topic.
long_description: Add RSS and Atom feeds to Thoth and let the agent fetch the latest articles for you. Manage subscriptions with add/remove/list, pull new entries from a single feed or all feeds at once, sorted by date. Powered by feedparser for robust compatibility with virtually any feed format.

tools.name: rss_reader
tools.description: Manage RSS/Atom feed subscriptions and fetch the latest entries

skills.name: rss_reader
skills.description: Guides the agent on when and how to use the RSS Reader tool

default_count.label: Default number of entries
default_count.description: How many feed entries to fetch per request (1-30)
